BYOK

FAQ

Is the platform completely free?

Yes! StudyMind AI is 100% free with no fees or paid plans.

How does the AI work?

You add your own API key from OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google, and pay only the AI provider directly.

What file types are supported?

PDF, Word (DOCX), PowerPoint (PPTX), Images (PNG/JPG), and text files (TXT).

Is my data secure?

Yes, API keys are encrypted with AES-256, and your files are securely stored.

Ready to Study Smarter?

Join thousands of students using AI to supercharge their learning
